title: Pocket Mobs
description: Battle with mobs using Pokémon Showdown. Made for ModFest: Carnival.
body:
[![Made for ModFest: Carnival](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ModFest/art/v2/badge/svg/carnival/cozy.svg)](https://modfest.net/carnival)

Battle with mobs using Pokémon Showdown.

Get a Mob Ball (no recipe yet) and throw it at a mob to capture that mob. You can then send it out. If two people send their mobs out nearby, they enter a battle.

the mob ball icon was edited from [a rom hacking resource](https://github.com/rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion/pull/3313) ignore that
